message:
🐛 Fix local cluster filter using correct cluster source

Pass effectiveClusters (which includes agent-fetched clusters) to
ClusterFilterDropdown instead of availableClusters from useChartFilters
which only includes deduplicatedClusters.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
